strip.title: We compare the most trusted remittance providers

why.title: Save on every transfer to Latin America
why.subtitle: One place, all providers. No surprises, no hidden fees.
why.bestRateDesc: We compare the most popular providers and show you which gives you the most for your dollar. Period.
why.instantDesc: Enter an amount and see real results in seconds. No endless forms or signups.
why.trustedDesc: We don't charge anything. We just help you decide before sending your money.

steps.title: 3 steps. That's it.
steps.subtitle: Saving on your transfers is this easy.
steps.step1Desc: Type the dollar amount you want to send from the United States.
steps.step2Desc: Instantly see how much arrives through each provider, with fees and delivery times included.
steps.step3Desc: Click the best option and we'll take you directly to the provider to complete your transfer.

cta.title: Ready to send more for less?
cta.subtitle: Takes 10 seconds. Compare the best providers and choose the one that works for you today.

faq.title: What you need to know
faq.a1: No. PreEnvios is 100% free. We just help you compare so you can choose the best option. Fees are charged by each provider and we show them before you send.
faq.q2: How do you update the rates?
faq.a2: We check rates directly from each provider multiple times a day. What you see here is what you get when you send.
faq.a3: We compare Remitly, Wise, Xoom, Ria, WorldRemit, Western Union and MoneyGram for corridors USA → Honduras, USA → Dominican Republic, USA → Guatemala and USA → El Salvador.
faq.q4: How long does a transfer take?
faq.a4: It depends on the provider and method. Some are instant, others take up to 1 business day. We show the estimated time in each result.
faq.a5: Yes. We started with Honduras, Dominican Republic, Guatemala and El Salvador, and plan to expand to more Latin American corridors soon.
faq.q6: Why do some operators appear first?
faq.a6: The order of results considers the exchange rate, transfer speed and commercial agreements with some operators. Preenvios.com may receive a commission when you click and complete a transfer. This comes at no additional cost to you.

footer.desc: Compare remittance providers before sending money to Latin America. Save on every transfer.
footer.disclaimerText: PreEnvios.com is an informational comparison tool. We are not a financial institution, we do not process payments, receive or send money. Published rates are approximate and may differ from the final amount offered by each provider at the time of transaction. Results may be ordered according to affiliate agreements. Preenvios.com does not guarantee that the rates shown are final at the time of transfer.
footer.copyright: © 2026 PreEnvios.com — Made with ❤ for the Latin American diaspora

banks.title: Reference rates
banks.subtitle: Weekly update
banks.note: Reference rates published by each country's Central Bank. El Salvador has been dollarized since 2001.

disclaimers.d1: Rates shown are approximate and may vary at the time of transaction. Always confirm the final amount directly with the remittance provider before sending.
disclaimers.d2: PreEnvios.com is not a financial institution. We do not process payments, receive or send money. We only compare public information from remittance providers.
disclaimers.d3: The order of results may be influenced by commercial agreements with operators.
disclaimers.d4: PreEnvios may receive a commission when you click and complete a transfer. This comes at no additional cost to you and does not affect the ranking order.
disclaimers.d5: PreEnvios is not responsible for losses resulting from decisions made based on the information displayed. Users must exercise their own judgment and verify data before transferring money. By using this site, you accept these terms.
disclaimers.d6: The logos and names of remittance providers shown are nominative trademarks used for informational comparison purposes. PreEnvios is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by these companies unless otherwise indicated.

legal.deleteRequestDesc: To request deletion of your personal data, send an email to
legal.deleteRequestNote: We will respond within 30 days in compliance with CCPA and GDPR.
